title: AI-enabled business blueprint
description: Define what buyers on sales calls are looking for, how to deliver those needs with packaged offers, the expected weekly/monthly capacity for new agreements, and how having an AI team shifts the company’s vision.
full_idea: Remember I need to come up with a blueprint of my business and how my time is spent on that business. I need to know what the people who come into the Sales calls (I want to take) are looking for. I need to know how to give them what they are looking for. I need to know how to package the way that I present to them what they are looking for in a way that they would feel stupid to say no to the trade offer I present them. I need to know how many new agreements I’m capable of taking on per week or month. I need to know what changes about my vision for the future now that I have an AI team.
source_text: Remember I need to come up with a blueprint of my business and how my time is spent on that business. I need to know how many new agreements I’m capable of taking on per week or month. I need to know what changes about my vision for the future now that I have an AI team.
